# Neurodiversity Global

> UK-based global consultancy specialising in neurodiversity in work, leadership, systems design and performance.

Neurodiversity Global provides neurodiversity training, consultancy, and coaching to organisations across all sectors. Founded in 2010 and led by Rich Daly, the consultancy works with employers, public sector bodies, and parents/carers to build neuroinclusive systems.

## Core Services

- [Neurodiversity Training](https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com/neurodiversity-training): CPD-accredited workshops for managers, HR, leaders, and whole teams. Delivered online and in-person across the UK and internationally.
- [Neurodiversity Consultancy](https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com/neurodiversity-consultancy): Strategic reviews, policy development, and systems design for neuroinclusive organisations.
- [Workshops](https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com/workshops): Full catalogue of available training sessions including awareness, manager, advanced, and specialist workshops.

## Pathways

- [For Employers](https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com/for-employers): Neuroinclusion strategy, training, and ongoing support for employers.
- [For Public Sector](https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com/for-public-sector): Tailored programmes for NHS, local authorities, emergency services, and government bodies.
- [For Parents & Carers](https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com/for-parents): Evidence-based guidance and presentations for parents of neurodivergent children.

## Industry Expertise

Neurodiversity Global delivers sector-specific programmes for: Healthcare & NHS, Education, Public Sector, Technology, Engineering, Corporate & Enterprise, Charity & Third Sector, Legal, Emergency Services, Rail & Transport, Sales & Commercial, Contact Centres, Defence & National Infrastructure, Retail & Hospitality.

## Key Pages

- [About](https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com/about): Our story, approach, and values.
- [Our Team](https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com/about/team): Meet the team.
- [Blog](https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com/blog): Articles, white papers, and evidence-based guidance on neurodiversity in the workplace and for parents.
- [Case Studies](https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com/case-studies): Client outcomes and testimonials.
- [Clients](https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com/clients): Organisations we work with including NHS Blood and Transplant, TransPennine Express, SUEZ, Smartest Energy, ACAS, and others.
- [Ask Rich](https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com/ask-rich): AI-powered Q&A on neurodiversity topics.

## Contact

- Email: hello@neurodiversityglobal.com
- Website: https://www.neurodiversityglobal.com

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2010
- Based: United Kingdom
- Reach: Global (delivered in 15+ countries)
- Specialisation: Neurodiversity (ADHD, autism, dyslexia, dyspraxia, dyscalculia, and co-occurring conditions)
- Approach: Evidence-based, practical, systems-level
